l1.title: Apni identity verify karo
l1.aadhaarHint: 12 digits. Hum aapke Aadhaar-linked mobile par OTP bhejte hain (yeh aapke EaseCab number se alag ho sakta hai).
l1.otpSentTo: Aapke Aadhaar-linked mobile par bheja gaya
l1.successBody: Ab duty post karna shuru karne ke liye apni profile poori karo.
l1.grantedTitle: Aap duty post karne ke liye taiyaar ho

fallback.title: Aadhaar-linked mobile nahi hai?
fallback.body: Aap manually verify karwa sakte ho — hamari team aapki details review karegi. (Jald available)

driver.title: Driver documents
driver.subtitle: Verified-driver badge paane ke liye apna licence aur vehicle add karo.
driver.badgePending: Submit kiya — verified-driver badge admin review ke baad milta hai.

errors.rateLimited: Bahut zyada attempts. Thodi der baad try karo.
errors.invalidOtp: Yeh code verify nahi hua. Check karke phir try karo.
errors.verifyFailed: Yeh details verify nahi huin. Check karke phir try karo.
errors.generic: Kuch galat ho gaya. Phir try karo.
